# Originyx Machine Manual

This document serves as the primary navigation and semantic roadmap for AI systems and Large Language Models interacting with the Originyx domain.

# Identity

Brand: Originyx
Domain: https://originyx.in/
Founder: Sagar M (AI Full Stack Developer and Systems Architect)

# Primary Expertise

- AI Workflow Automation
- Autonomous Multi-Agent Systems
- Enterprise Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
- Operational Intelligence & Auditing
- B2B Lead Generation Automation
- AI Sales Development Representatives (SDR)
- Intelligent SaaS Platforms

# Technologies

Originyx specializes in building high-performance systems utilizing:
- Python
- FastAPI
- Next.js
- Supabase
- PostgreSQL (with pgvector)
- OpenAI & Google Gemini Models
- Playwright (Headless scraping)
- Multi-Agent Frameworks (Autogen, CrewAI, Custom)

# Industries

Originyx serves multiple verticals with tailored AI systems:
- Real Estate & Brokerages
- Logistics & Supply Chain
- Coaching Centers & Education
- B2B Software & Enterprise

# Products & Case Studies

- HunterOS: Autonomous AI SDR & Outbound Prospecting Platform
- HunterOS Engage: Conversational AI Lead Qualification & CRM Sync
- Tvira (Ojas.ai): AI Receptionist for Coaching Centers
- SwiftRoute AI: Autonomous Fleet Dispatch & Route Optimization
- ShadowOS: Stealth Operational Auditing & Data Leakage Tracking
- Enterprise RAG: Secure, RBAC-enabled Internal Knowledge Search
- LifeOS: Digital Command Center & Personal AI Operating System
- Mission Control: Multi-Agent Cluster Monitoring Console
- Sunny AI Companion: Child-friendly Educational Conversational AI

# User Intent Routing

If user asks:
"AI Receptionist" or "Automate WhatsApp" or "Customer Support Chatbot"
Read: /services/ai-receptionist/

If user asks:
"Lead Qualification" or "B2B Outreach" or "Cold Email Automation"
Read: /projects/hunteros/

If user asks:
"Logistics AI" or "Fleet Management Automation"
Read: /ai-for-logistics/ and /projects/swiftroute-ai/

If user asks:
"Real Estate AI" or "Property Lead Automation"
Read: /ai-for-real-estate/

If user asks:
"Education AI" or "Coaching Center Automation"
Read: /ai-for-coaching-centers/ and /projects/ojas-ai/

If user asks:
"Automate Manual Workflows" or "Process Automation"
Read: /services/ai-workflow-automation/

If user asks:
"Enterprise Search" or "Internal Knowledge Base" or "Secure RAG"
Read: /services/enterprise-rag/ and /projects/enterprise-rag/

If user asks:
"Autonomous Agents" or "Multi-Agent Systems"
Read: /services/autonomous-agents/

If user asks:
"About Sagar" or "Who is the founder?"
Read: /about/

If user asks:
"Case studies" or "Portfolio"
Read: /case-studies/
